text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our second summer camp together begins, and
Fuji Kiseki wants to make sure everyone
thoroughly enjoys both their work and play.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our battles will only get tougher from here on
out, and it seems she wants to get even better!
